{{Infobox artifact
| name = Kiro's armor
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's armor]] is [[Soulsmith]] work with bright silver or dull yellow visible through the seams.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's armor]] has outer plates of gray [[madra]] that are cracked and split, revealing silver and gold beneath.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's armor]] contains a [[Forged]] barrier and uses [[Enforced]] strength and speed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's armor]] uses a [[Ruler attack]] with its own guidance [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
